Uses of Class
jellyfish.JellyfishException

Packages that use JellyfishException
Package
Description
jellyfish
Contains the main classes for the Jellyfish chatbot application, including the entry point, command parser, task list, storage, and UI.

  • Uses of JellyfishException in jellyfish

    Methods in jellyfish that throw JellyfishException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    Storage.load(ArrayList<Task> tasks)
    Loads tasks from the data file into the given list.
    static void
    Storage.save(ArrayList<Task> tasks)
    Saves all tasks to the data file, overwriting any existing content.
